meaning: adj.平滑的,平坦的,平稳的,无毛的,流畅的,圆滑的,安祥的vt.使光滑,烫平,使优雅,消除vi.变平滑,变平静n.一块平地,平滑部分
examples: The metal felt smooth and cold.
The plane made a smooth landing.
The combination produces a combined 438 horsepower, with smooth transitions between battery-powered mode and conventional mode.
Your flight has been smooth, the food good, the flight attendants smiling and the seats comfortable.
